sections.paragraph:
verb לראות

to see; look, behold; foresee, expect; find; perceive, notice, realize, feel; choose, prefer

verb להיראות

be seen, visible; accepted, acceptable, likely; appear, be revealed; to look, seem; pretend

verb להראות

to show, exhibit; reveal; demonstrate

verb הוראה

be shown, exhibited; revealed; demonstrated

verb להתראות

to see each other, meet
